title: Polybotrya fractiserialis
taxonomy: Polybotrya fractiserialis is a species within the genus Polybotrya, which belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This genus is a group of ferns, specifically the Polybotrya genus, which consists of species found in tropical regions. The family Dryopteridaceae is a part of the larger division Polypodiopsida, which includes various types of ferns. intro: Polybotrya fractiserialis is a species of fern, specifically a type of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in wound healing and infection prevention.
